title: SVDVD-813 Shame Freshman Growth Health Examination 2020 ~ Midsummer ~
description: Only 6 girls were selected from my school for the special health checkup conducted by the prefecture. What do you do with a special medical examination? Does it hurt? Is it fun? Would you like to get an injection? We all got on the bus and arrived at a small gymnasium. that? But it doesn't seem to be a school here. There are boys as well as girls ... What will happen to us from now on ...
